raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/2023, I fell victim to a multi-layered scam operation run by orchestrated by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX using the aliases XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX, President of the XXXX XXXX XXXX which involved me making deposits for a total amount of XXXX USD from my American Express account to fraudulent firm ( s ). 

XXXX XXXX reported to me that the scammers had access to my computer. They said that the only way to get rid of it was to buy gift cards. I purchased gift cards from XXXX worth XXXX USD, charged to my American Express credit card. 
XXXX said charges would be refunded, but so far have been unable to do so. 
Please take notice that my funds were transferred through means of coercion and under false pretenses all along! 
Attached, please find supportive statements, screenshots, and further evidence.
